stemHtml: An aircraft is approaching over deep water to a runway which lies perpendicular to a rocky shoreline. It is a clear winter day with calm wind. What will be the pilot’s perception?

options.a: The pilot may experience a black hole illusion, so they need to rely on their instruments
options.b: The pilot should rely on the artificial horizon as the true horizon may be lost
options.c: The pilot may overestimate the height of the aircraft, which may result in a short landing
options.d: The pilot may underestimate the height of the aircraft which may result in a long landing
